paper_threads.summary: Discussion of OmniReset framework for training robot policies using large-scale RL and diverse resets for contact-rich manipulation tasks.
Research on subliminal prompting propagation across networks of interacting AI agents, raising safety concerns about AI interface deployment.
Discussion of research on AI sycophancy and its deeper harms beyond just feeling inauthentic in interactions.
Controversy over Google's TurboQuant paper allegedly having insufficient citations and deliberately avoiding comparison with RaBitQ.

announcements.summary: Slime v0.2.4 release focusing on profiling and observability with rollout trace timeline viewer and real-time W&B reporting.
University of Washington astronomers discovered evidence of two planets colliding 11,000 light-years away, potentially aiding search for Earth-like worlds.
Highlighting Cohere Transcribe as #2 on Open ASR Leaderboard and #1 for multilingual applications.

discussions.summary: Discussion about switching from Ollama to llama.cpp and from OpenClaw to Hermes as basic best practices for local AI model deployment.
Debate about Europe's inability to build frontier AI models, suggesting it signals the end of European AI competitiveness.
Observation that Claude Opus has surprising knowledge gaps due to PDF crawl problems affecting model training data.
Advocacy for working on AI interpretability since suitable metrics for optimization haven't been found yet.
